source: Creator Monetize — Elixir Genesis, Offer Creation, Dream Outcome, Product Design
core_principle: You are NOT selling a product. You are selling an outcome — the sizzle, not the steak.

buy_triggers.pain: When pain of current situation outweighs pain of change/investment. Cannot create pain, only amplify through copy and sales.
buy_triggers.confidence: Enough belief they will get the result. Sources: You, Your Offer, Your Results.
buy_triggers.formula: Confidence + Pain = Buy. Comfort + Doubt = Don't buy.

offer_definition: A specific problem you solve for a specific person in a specific way

2_perceived_problems.name: Understand Current State
2_perceived_problems.method: List every step they must take from current state to dream outcome

3_sub_problems.name: Sub-Problems for Each Step
lenses: I won't be able to do it
It will take too much time
It will take too much effort
I won't be good at it

4_solutions.name: Turn into Solutions
4_solutions.method: Add 'How to' at the beginning of each sub-problem

5_group_and_name.name: Make Fancy & Group
5_group_and_name.method: Combine solutions into named solution packages

6_makeup.name: Unique Mechanism, Bonuses, Guarantees, Naming, Urgency, Scarcity
6_makeup.unique_mechanism_template: Most everyone trying to achieve result is doing this... Here's the problem with that... Which ultimately means... So instead, we do... Which allows us to... Which ultimately means...
bonuses_rules: Ascribe and justify a price tag
Solve the NEXT problem before they encounter it

7_pricing.name: Pricing Strategy
7_pricing.price_to_value: Focus on increasing value, not decreasing price
7_pricing.virtuous_cycle: Price UP → emotional investment UP → perceived value UP → results UP → revenue UP
7_pricing.vicious_cycle: Price DOWN → emotional investment DOWN → perceived value DOWN → results DOWN → revenue DOWN

roadmap.description: The spine of the product — step-by-step breakdown of where students should be at every stage
rules: Milestones should be submittable for review

change_drivers.pain: Physical, emotional, psychological pain motivates change
